label: Crypto Yield Automation
notes: Exchange choice: AU-licensed for AUD off-ramp (CoinSpot/IndependentReserve need KYC, but for AUD receipts only).
Kraken / Binance used for crypto snapshots (public endpoints, no KYC for read-only).
max_capital_aud == 0 forces observation-only; --execute is refused at runtime.
